commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7b1f2e243cb15474d36f2585c543d62dad608f50)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Policy plugin scanning, doctor checks, tests, and docs for a configurable exec-approvals.json policy artifact.

PR surface: Source +759, Tests +210, Docs +63. Total +1032 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: configure exec-approvals.json with agents["*"] security or allowlist and a scoped execApprovals rule for a named agent without an exact entry. Current runtime inherits wildcard posture, while the PR checker falls back to defaults or exact entries only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer policy-surface review; automation cannot supply the contributor setup proof for this external draft.

target.title: feat(policy): cover exec approvals artifact
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
